---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new subagent, skill, hook, or tier change
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem this solves

<What friction or capability gap motivates this?>

## Proposed solution

<Hook, skill, subagent, or other? What does it do?>

## Routing rule check

- [ ] Could a hook detect this deterministically? (If yes: this should be a hook, not a skill.)
- [ ] Is this a repeatable multi-step workflow? (If yes: skill is the right answer.)
- [ ] Is this a fact that can't be read from code? (If yes: CLAUDE.md line is enough.)

## Evidence

<What real-world friction has shown this is needed? Cite Insights data, session logs, or specific incidents.>

## Tier placement

<Which tier should this live in? Why?>
